requests.problem: I manage my irregular rotating shift schedule (day shifts and night shifts) using paper or phone notes, and it's hard to tell when my next night shift is.
requests.desiredFeatures: I'd like to enter my shifts and get a calendar view that shows my next shift at a glance, plus a reminder the day before.

requests.problem: With the three-shift rotation, my sleep times are all over the place, which throws off my daily rhythm and makes me prone to getting sick.
requests.desiredFeatures: A feature where I enter my shift type (day/evening/night) and it suggests the sleep window I should aim for that day.

requests.problem: Shift swaps with coworkers get scattered across group chat messages, and it's hard to keep track of who wants to swap which day with whom.
requests.desiredFeatures: A board where you can post 'I want to swap this day' and get matched with someone whose conditions fit.

requests.problem: I always worry about falling asleep and missing my stop on the train home after a night shift.
requests.desiredFeatures: A feature where I register my transfer/destination station and it sounds an alarm to keep me from sleeping through it.

requests.problem: My breaks are short and irregular, and I have no record of when I actually took them.
requests.desiredFeatures: One-tap logging of break start/end times, with a view of my total break time for the day.

requests.problem: When I have to self-report my overtime hours, I often can't remember the exact times.
requests.desiredFeatures: Tap to log clock-in/clock-out times, with automatic overtime totals calculated at the end of the month.

requests.problem: On night shift days my usual meal times don't fit, so my nutrition ends up unbalanced.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggestions for meal timing and simple menu ideas tailored to whether it's a night shift or day shift.

requests.problem: I forget how many paid leave days I have left and when I applied for them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A way to track my remaining paid leave days and my application history in one list.

requests.problem: I sometimes forget the deadline for submitting my shift preferences (requested days off).
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder that notifies me of the monthly shift-request submission deadline.

requests.problem: As a new nurse, different senior staff taught me different methods and procedures, and I got confused about what the actual ward rule was.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared notebook where ward staff can write down and share the correct procedures and rules.

requests.problem: I get asked where the same supplies are located over and over during shifts, and explaining it verbally each time is a hassle.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple map with photos where you can look up where ward supplies are stored.

requests.problem: There's so much to cover during handover that I worry about forgetting something.
requests.desiredFeatures: A checklist of handover items per patient to prevent anything from being missed.

requests.problem: I can't tell if the break room is occupied during night shift, and sometimes I get there only to find it full.
requests.desiredFeatures: A feature to check break room availability and reserve it from my phone.

requests.problem: My commute doesn't line up with my irregular work hours, so I have to look up the first/last train every single time.
requests.desiredFeatures: Enter my shift start time and it automatically shows me which train to take that day.

requests.problem: On busy shift days I forget to drink water, and before I know it I'm slightly dehydrated.
requests.desiredFeatures: A gentle notification reminding me to drink water at set intervals.

requests.problem: I want to request a department transfer, but I haven't organized what to say or how to say it.
requests.desiredFeatures: A template for organizing and writing out my reasons and preferred conditions for a transfer request.

requests.problem: I'm in charge of training new nurses, but I forget to note down what I've taught and their progress.
requests.desiredFeatures: A notebook to easily track what's been taught and each trainee's progress.

requests.problem: I notice near-miss incidents during my shift but forget about them later, so my reports end up late.
requests.desiredFeatures: A quick note-taking feature to jot things down on the spot, then organize them into a report draft later.

requests.problem: It's hard to coordinate days off that match with fellow nurses and coworkers.
requests.desiredFeatures: A feature to share our requested days off and automatically find matching dates.

requests.problem: I don't know the availability of the bike/car parking at work, and sometimes I only find out there's no space once I get there.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple board to check parking availability in real time.

requests.problem: When my period overlaps with night shifts, I tend to feel much worse, but I can't predict when that overlap will happen.
requests.desiredFeatures: Enter both my period cycle and my shifts, and it warns me in advance of days they're likely to overlap.

requests.problem: I'm so busy that I often notice I'm feeling unwell too late, and end up pushing through work anyway.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple health diary - one tap a day to log how I'm feeling, with an alert if symptoms persist.

requests.problem: My hands get badly chapped from all the handwashing and alcohol sanitizing, but I keep forgetting to take care of them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder to apply hand cream at set times.

requests.problem: I have chronic lower back pain, but I have no record of which postures or tasks make it worse.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple pain diary to log when my back hurts and what I was doing at the time.

requests.problem: On busy days I skip lunch, which sometimes makes me feel sick later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A feature to log skipped meals and warn me if it happens too many days in a row.

requests.problem: I forget to log scary incidents like needlestick injuries.
requests.desiredFeatures: A quick incident-logging note I can fill out on the spot.

requests.problem: I always almost forget to book my annual health checkup and vaccinations.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list to manage and get notified about health checkup and vaccination dates.

requests.problem: My sleep hours vary wildly day to day, and I don't have a clear picture of how much sleep I'm actually getting.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log bedtime and wake time, and show my weekly sleep totals in a graph.

requests.problem: It's hard for me to notice when stress is building up - I usually only realize it once I'm at my limit.
requests.desiredFeatures: Answer a few simple questions and it visualizes my current stress level.

requests.problem: Being so busy, I keep putting off doctor visits and picking up my prescriptions.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder for upcoming doctor visits and prescription pickups.

requests.problem: With all the standing, my legs swell up badly, but I don't track when it gets worse.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple way to log my leg swelling level every day.

requests.problem: During busy stretches I'm slow to notice changes in my weight or health.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple tracking app for logging weight and health just once a week.

requests.problem: I want to donate blood regularly, but I always forget the waiting period before I can donate again.
requests.desiredFeatures: Enter my last donation date and it tells me the next date I'm eligible to donate.

requests.problem: I worry about the skin irritation from masks and gloves, but I keep missing the right time for skincare.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder to do my post-shift skincare routine.

requests.problem: I'm too busy to remember what I discussed or realized in counseling sessions.
requests.desiredFeatures: A diary for quickly jotting down insights from counseling sessions.

requests.problem: Certifications like BLS and ACLS all have different renewal deadlines, and I can't keep track of them all.
requests.desiredFeatures: Register each certification name and renewal date, and get notified as the deadline approaches.

requests.problem: I want to look up abbreviations and medical terms on the spot, but searching each one individually is a hassle.
requests.desiredFeatures: A quick-reference dictionary of common nursing abbreviations and terms.

requests.problem: I forget to log the training sessions and workshops I attend (for continuing education credits).
requests.desiredFeatures: One-tap logging of attended training sessions, with automatic tallying of my annual credit total.

requests.problem: I calculate medication dosages with a calculator every time, and I'm worried about making mistakes.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple calculator where I just enter weight and prescribed amount (for double-checking purposes only).

requests.problem: I take notes on tips and tricks from senior nurses, but later I can never find where I wrote them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A note app for tagging tips I've learned so they're easy to search for later.

requests.problem: While job-hunting, information on hospitals and job listings I'm interested in ends up scattered everywhere.
requests.desiredFeatures: A way to gather and compare job listings and hospital info I'm interested in, all in one list.

requests.problem: I have lots of study guides and videos I want to work through, but I forget how far I've gotten.
requests.desiredFeatures: A checklist to track my progress through each study resource.

requests.problem: I want to look back on cases I've learned from, but my notes end up scattered.
requests.desiredFeatures: A notebook to organize what I've learned by topic (with the assumption that no personal/identifying info is written).

requests.problem: I'm gathering info on certified nurse specialist programs and career advancement, but the requirements and deadlines are all scattered and hard to organize.
requests.desiredFeatures: A way to consolidate and manage requirements and deadlines for career paths I'm interested in.

requests.problem: I sometimes forget the dates of study sessions or in-house training and end up canceling last minute.
requests.desiredFeatures: Register training dates and get reminded ahead of time.

requests.problem: I want to read English medical materials, but the heavy jargon makes me give up.
requests.desiredFeatures: A flashcard set focused on commonly used medical English vocabulary.

requests.problem: I make training manuals for new nurses from scratch every time, which takes a lot of time.
requests.desiredFeatures: Turn commonly used training topics into reusable templates.

requests.problem: Info on seminars and study sessions I'm interested in gets scattered across social media and email, so I miss things.
requests.desiredFeatures: Bookmark events I'm interested in and manage them all in one list.

requests.problem: I struggle to carve out time for self-study, and it never sticks.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log study time, even just a few minutes, and visualize how it adds up.

requests.problem: Even when I make a study plan for a certification exam, not knowing my progress makes me anxious.
requests.desiredFeatures: Track both the days remaining until the exam and my progress through the material I planned to cover.

requests.problem: Night shift allowances and overtime pay vary every month, making it hard to predict my income.
requests.desiredFeatures: Roughly estimate this month's pay based on my scheduled shifts.

requests.problem: I sometimes lose track of my nursing school scholarship loan repayment status.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple budgeting tool to track my remaining scholarship loan balance and repayment schedule.

requests.problem: Spending on work items like scrubs and nursing shoes adds up, but I don't track how much I've spent.
requests.desiredFeatures: A dedicated budget category for tracking spending on work supplies only.

requests.problem: Living alone, I try to keep a budget but always give up after a few days.
requests.desiredFeatures: An ultra-simple budget app where I can quickly log just the total from each receipt.

requests.problem: I don't know the going rate for wedding gift money or baby gifts for friends, so I have to look it up every time.
requests.desiredFeatures: Track typical gift amounts for different occasions, along with what I actually gave.

requests.problem: I want to save money, but I have no habit of reviewing what I've spent on.
requests.desiredFeatures: A rough visual breakdown of my monthly fixed vs. variable expenses.

requests.problem: I don't keep records of income and expenses from my side business (like selling handmade goods).
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple ledger just for tracking side business sales and expenses.

requests.problem: I'm slow to notice when I've overspent on my credit card or e-money.
requests.desiredFeatures: Set a rough spending target for the month and get warned if I'm about to exceed it.

requests.problem: I forget to note down expenses that qualify for hometown tax donations or medical expense deductions.
requests.desiredFeatures: A separate space to log expenses that might qualify for tax deductions.

requests.problem: I can't stick to savings goals for trips or big purchases.
requests.desiredFeatures: A savings tracker where I set a target amount and deadline, and see my progress in a game-like way.

requests.problem: I forget the details of my insurance policies and when they renew.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list to manage the types of insurance I have and their renewal dates.

requests.problem: Settling up dues and reimbursements for work parties and farewell events is always a hassle.
requests.desiredFeatures: Enter participants and who paid what, and it calculates who owes whom.

requests.problem: I sometimes keep paying for fixed costs like subscriptions I'm not even using.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list of active subscriptions and their next renewal dates, with prompts to reconsider them.

requests.problem: It's hard to estimate the upfront costs of moving or living alone.
requests.desiredFeatures: A checklist to estimate moving-related cost items.

requests.problem: I always scramble to gather documents for tax filing and medical expense deductions at the last minute.
requests.desiredFeatures: A year-round checklist to keep track of the documents needed for tax filing.

requests.problem: With my irregular schedule, laundry timing is all over the place and I sometimes run out of clean clothes.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggest laundry days based on my work schedule.

requests.problem: After a string of busy days I have no energy to cook, so I end up living on convenience store food.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggest simple recipes I can make even with low energy, based on how tired I am that day.

requests.problem: Living alone, I tend to let my houseplants die.
requests.desiredFeatures: A plant care app that logs and reminds me when to water them.

requests.problem: My shopping times are irregular, so I lose track of what's in the fridge and end up buying duplicates.
requests.desiredFeatures: Keep a note of what's in the fridge that I can check before shopping.

requests.problem: Mail and package deliveries don't line up with my work schedule, and I forget to arrange redelivery.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder to request redelivery whenever a missed-delivery notice comes in.

requests.problem: I don't know where to start cleaning my room, so I keep putting it off.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggest just one quick cleaning task per day.

requests.problem: With shift work, it's hard to match schedules with friends, and I always have to be the one coordinating dates.
requests.desiredFeatures: A schedule link to easily share which days I'm free.

requests.problem: I keep putting off calling or messaging my family back home because I'm so busy.
requests.desiredFeatures: A gentle reminder to reach out to family regularly.

requests.problem: I never know when to restock household consumables like toilet paper or detergent, and I keep forgetting.
requests.desiredFeatures: Track the remaining stock of everyday items and get notified when they're about to run out.

requests.problem: I forget deadlines for moving procedures or contract renewals.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list to manage deadlines for rental contracts and other procedures.

requests.problem: I buy groceries in bulk after a night shift but can't use them all before they go to waste.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log purchased groceries and their expiration dates to help me use them up in time.

requests.problem: I don't know if the emergency supplies in my apartment have expired.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list to track my emergency supply contents and their expiration dates.

requests.problem: I have a pet, but with my irregular schedule I often miss logging feedings or vet visits.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log pet feedings, vet visits, and health while sharing the record with family or a partner.

requests.problem: Every year I can't remember who to send New Year's cards or seasonal greetings to, or when.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list of recipients along with what I sent them last year.

requests.problem: I'm too busy and always miss the right time to book a salon or nail appointment.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log my last visit date and get told when it's about time to book again.

requests.problem: I can't talk to anyone about the frustrations from workplace relationships, so I bottle them up alone.
requests.desiredFeatures: A private, anonymous diary-like space to write out my feelings that no one else sees.

requests.problem: On days when dealing with patients or their families leaves me feeling down, I go into my next shift without ever sorting out my feelings.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple way to log the day's events and feelings, so I can look back on them later.

requests.problem: Being so busy, I lose touch with friends, and I worry about the relationships fading.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log the last time I contacted each friend, and get flagged about ones I haven't reached out to in a while.

requests.problem: I want to try dating apps, but my irregular schedule makes it hard to coordinate plans with matches.
requests.desiredFeatures: A schedule feature to easily share my available times.

requests.problem: I miss the chance to thank or compliment coworkers in the moment.
requests.desiredFeatures: A message card feature to easily send a 'thank you' even after the moment has passed.

requests.problem: When I'm feeling down, I can't recall encouraging words or things I've accomplished before.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to stockpile encouraging messages to myself and happy memories.

requests.problem: New nurses and junior staff often come to me for advice, but it's hard to remember what each conversation was about.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple way to log what was discussed and what advice I gave.

requests.problem: Living alone, there are days after a night shift when I feel lonely.
requests.desiredFeatures: A low-pressure space to loosely connect with people in similar situations.

requests.problem: I bottle up small uneasy feelings from work because I can't tell anyone about them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A private note just for putting bottled-up feelings into words, never shown to anyone.

requests.problem: Being busy cuts into time with my partner or family, and it sometimes strains the relationship.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple way to log time spent and conversations had with people who matter to me.

requests.problem: My list of books to read and shows to watch keeps growing, but I always forget what's on it.
requests.desiredFeatures: A list of books/shows I want to read or watch, with tracking for what I've finished.

requests.problem: I want to start exercising, but my irregular schedule doesn't fit gym class times.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggest simple stretches or workouts I can do in spare moments.

requests.problem: I can't keep track of the schedule and spending for my fan activities (events, merch, etc.).
requests.desiredFeatures: A dedicated place to track fan-activity schedules and spending.

requests.problem: Even when I try managing to-dos with a planner or app, I never stick with it.
requests.desiredFeatures: Suggest a realistic amount of to-dos for the day, based on my shift.

requests.problem: I start learning a language, but being busy makes it hard to keep up.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log just 5 minutes of study a day and visualize the streak.

requests.problem: I want to travel, but with irregular days off it's hard to plan trips.
requests.desiredFeatures: Note candidate travel plans so I can quickly recall them once my requested days off are approved.

requests.problem: Handmade crafts and sewing are my hobby, but my materials and project ideas end up scattered.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to note down project ideas and the materials needed for them.

requests.problem: I take photos to capture memories, but they just pile up unorganized on my phone.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple memory diary for easily looking back on just my favorite moments.

requests.problem: Amid the busyness, I have no habit of rewarding myself, so my hard work never feels acknowledged.
requests.desiredFeatures: Log small rewards on days I worked hard, so I can look back on them.

requests.problem: I can't find time to slowly think through my future career or lifestyle.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to jot down thoughts about the future whenever they come to mind.
